languages.text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить Сектором Бионика, стал лучше понимать Вивисектора Мартинакса, после того как тому установили кортикальный имплант, и вместе они спасли немало жизней. Вивисектор помогал ему в изысканиях, и так был создан один из самых полных сборников размышлений о природе аугментации в Просторе Коронус. После смерти Мартинакса, Ферренц извлек его кортикальный имплант и символически установил его себе в знак уважения к мирянину.

Genetor Ferrenz, who remained in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. By their combined efforts, they salvaged many lives. Assisting in the Genetor's research, the Vivisector contributed to what would become one of the most exhaustive collections of treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse. Following Martinax's passing, Ferrenz extracted his cortical implant and ceremonially integrated it into his own cranium as a mark of respect to the layman.
languages.original_text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить Сектором Бионика, стал лучше понимать Вивисектора Мартинакса, после того как тому установили кортикальный имплант, и вместе они спасли немало жизней. Вивисектор помогал ему в изысканиях, и так был создан один из самых полных сборников размышлений о природе аугментации в Просторе Коронус. После смерти Мартинакса, Ферренц извлек его кортикальный имплант и символически установил его себе в знак уважения к мирянину.

traits.locale_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. By their conjoined efforts, they salvaged many lives. Assisting in the Genetor's research, the Vivisector contributed to what would become one of the most exhaustive collections of discourse on the nature of the augmentation in the Koronus Expanse. Following Martinax's passing, Ferrenz extracted his cortical implant and ceremonially integrated it into his own cranium as a mark of respect to the layman.

Genetor Ferrenz, who remained in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. By their combined efforts, they salvaged many lives. Assisting in the Genetor's research, the Vivisector contributed to what would become one of the most exhaustive collections of treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse. Following Martinax's passing, Ferrenz extracted his cortical implant and ceremonially integrated it into his own cranium as a mark of respect to the layman.

Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. Ferrenz soon authorised the installation of a Noospheric corona for his colleague, which allowed them to communicate without words and scale new heights in their collaborative efforts. They went on to save countless lives together, and they co-authored a multi-volume work on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

Following Martinax's passing, Ferrenz extracted his cortical implant and ceremonially integrated it into his own cranium as a mark of respect to the layman.

By their combined efforts, they salvaged many lives. Assisting in the Genetor's research, the Vivisector contributed to what would become one of the most exhaustive collections of treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse. Following Martinax's passing, Ferrenz extracted his cortical implant and ceremonially integrated it into his own cranium as a mark of respect to the layman.

languages.text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区医务。在解剖者马丁纳克斯加装了皮层植入物之后，费伦茨对他的理解也随之加深。费伦茨很快便批准为他的同僚安装通感之环，使二人得以无需语言即可交流，并将合作研究推向新的高度。他们共同拯救了无数生命，为科罗努斯扩区中植入物的本质合著了一部多卷本的著作。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. Ferrenz soon authorised the installation of a Noospheric corona for his colleague, which allowed them to communicate without words and scale new heights in their collaborative efforts. They went on to save countless lives together, and they co-authored a multi-volume work on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

languages.text: Genetor Ferrenz, der nun die Verantwortung für den Sektor Bionica trug, verstand Vivisektor Martinax deutlich besser, nachdem der Chirurgeum ein kortikales Implantat erhalten hatte. Wenig später genehmigte Ferrenz die Installation einer noosphärischen Krone für seinen Kollegen, die ihm eine wortlose Kommunikation ermöglichte und ihrer Zusammenarbeit zu neuen Höhen verhalf. Gemeinsam retteten sie zahllose Leben und verfassten eine mehrbändige Abhandlung über das Wesen der Augmentation in der Koronus-Ausdehnung.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. Ferrenz soon authorised the installation of a Noospheric corona for his colleague, which allowed them to communicate without words and scale new heights in their collaborative efforts. They went on to save countless lives together, and they co-authored a multi-volume work on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

Gemeinsam retteten sie zahllose Leben und verfassten eine mehrbändige Abhandlung über das Wesen der Augmentation in der Koronus-Ausdehnung.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika'nın başında kalan Genetör Ferrenz, cerraha bir zihinsel implant takıldıktan sonra Dirikesimci Martinax'ı daha iyi anlamaya başladı. Ferrenz çok geçmeden meslektaşı için bir Noosferik korona kurulumuna izin verdi. Bu sayede kelimeler olmadan iletişim kurup ortak çabalarında yeni zirvelere ulaştılar. Birlikte sayısız hayat kurtarmaya devam ettiler ve Koronus Enginliği'ndeki ogmentasyonun doğası üzerine çok ciltli bir eser kaleme aldılar.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. Ferrenz soon authorised the installation of a Noospheric corona for his colleague, which allowed them to communicate without words and scale new heights in their collaborative efforts. They went on to save countless lives together, and they co-authored a multi-volume work on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

Ferrenz çok geçmeden meslektaşı için bir Noosferik korona kurulumuna izin verdi. Bu sayede kelimeler olmadan iletişim kurup ortak çabalarında yeni zirvelere ulaştılar. languages.text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando del Sector Bionica, llegó a comprender mejor al vivisector Martinax después de que se aumentase al cirujano con un implante cortical. Ferrenz no tardó en autorizar la instalación de una corona noosférica para su colega que les permitía comunicarse sin palabras y alcanzar nuevas cotas en sus colaboraciones. Juntos salvaron innumerables vidas y escribieron un tratado enciclopédico sobre la naturaleza de los aumentos en la Extensión de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. Ferrenz soon authorised the installation of a Noospheric corona for his colleague, which allowed them to communicate without words and scale new heights in their collaborative efforts. They went on to save countless lives together, and they co-authored a multi-volume work on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando del Sector Bionica, llegó a comprender mejor al vivisector Martinax después de que se aumentase al cirujano con un implante cortical. Ferrenz no tardó en autorizar la instalación de una corona noosférica para su colega que les permitía comunicarse sin palabras y alcanzar nuevas cotas en sus colaboraciones. Juntos salvaron innumerables vidas y escribieron un tratado enciclopédico sobre la naturaleza de los aumentos en la Extensión de Koronus.

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable du secteur Bionica, parvint à mieux comprendre le vivisecteur Martinax après que le chirurgeon reçut un implant cortical. Peu de temps après, Ferrenz autorisa l'installation d'une couronne noosphérique sur son collègue, ce qui leur permit de communiquer sans prononcer le moindre mot et d'atteindre de nouveaux sommets dans leur collaboration. Ensemble, ils sauvèrent d'innombrables vies et écrivirent une œuvre en plusieurs tomes sur la nature des augmentations dans les Étendues de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. Ferrenz soon authorised the installation of a Noospheric corona for his colleague, which allowed them to communicate without words and scale new heights in their collaborative efforts. They went on to save countless lives together, and they co-authored a multi-volume work on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable du secteur Bionica, parvint à mieux comprendre le vivisecteur Martinax après que le chirurgeon reçut un implant cortical. Peu de temps après, Ferrenz autorisa l'installation d'une couronne noosphérique sur son collègue, ce qui leur permit de communiquer sans prononcer le moindre mot et d'atteindre de nouveaux sommets dans leur collaboration. Ensemble, ils sauvèrent d'innombrables vies et écrivirent une œuvre en plusieurs tomes sur la nature des augmentations dans les Étendues de Koronus.

languages.text: セクター・ビオニカを任されたジェネターのフェレンツは、ヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスに皮質インプラントが取り付けられた後、彼をより深く理解するようになった。フェレンツはほどなく同僚へのノースフェリック・コロナの設置を認可し、それによって二人は言葉を交わさずとも意思を通わせ、協働の成果を新たな高みへと押し上げることができた。二人はその後ともに数えきれぬ命を救い、コロヌス・エクスパンスにおける強化の本質に関する多巻にわたる著作を共著したのだった。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica, came to better understand Vivisector Martinax after the chirurgeon was fitted with a cortical implant. Ferrenz soon authorised the installation of a Noospheric corona for his colleague, which allowed them to communicate without words and scale new heights in their collaborative efforts. They went on to save countless lives together, and they co-authored a multi-volume work on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.
